column1: Nick thought that his father (not to come) home yet.
Mary (to tell) us that she had cooked a good dinner.
Yesterday I found the book which I (to lose) in summer.
When we (to come) to the station, the train had already left.
David was irritated because the police inspector (to ask) him questions for more than an hour.
She (to work) as a shop-assistant for ten years in this shop.
Anthony (wait) for his airplane for 3 hours when its delay was announced.
I (to have) breakfast before I went to school.
